headline: Warren Buffett's Successor, Greg Abel, Started His Tenure With a Bang by Dumping Domino's and Making a Virtual Monopoly Berkshire's New No. 5 Holding
summary: The Oracle of Omaha's protege gave Domino's Pizza the heave-ho in favor of an artificial intelligence (AI) applications pioneer whose shares have gained more than 13,300% since its IPO.

headline: Top 25 High-Yield Dividend Stocks For July 2026
summary: The top 25 stocks average a 3.09% yield, ~12% undervaluation, and a projected 14.44% future CAGR. Check out the July 2026 dividend stock watchlist here.
